change: Generic parser now treats a visible star directly attached to a parsed author in a compact byline as a corresponding-author fallback, with blockers for equal-contribution, present-address, deceased, broad page, and non-distinguishing all-author star patterns.

broad_parser_snapshot_suite.notes: Failures span many unrelated publishers and include encoding/live fixture drift. The focused generic tests and Whole-Goldie smoke comparison passed with zero row-level deltas.

full_10k_gate.reason: Current queue has no HTML-available generic-only corresponding slice; generic-only and unknown corresponding tasks are retrieval-blocked. The 500-row smoke exercised generic dispatch three times and showed zero score/status movement, so no current-Goldie KPI lift was expected from a full 10K run.

recommendation: Ship the narrow generic parser fallback as precision-guarded production behavior. Continue retrieval/Browserbase lanes for generic-only publishers whose static HTML is currently unavailable.
